title: FedRAMP Rev5 Documentation
description: Schema for FedRAMP NIST SP 800-53 Rev5 control documentation

CTL.$comment: naming convention is CTL-[2 capital letters] for families, CTL-[family]-[family][2 digit control]([2 digit sub-control]) for controls. e.g. CTL-AC, CTL-AC-AC01, CTL-AC-AC02(01)
CTL.title: NIST 800-53 Rev5 Controls
CTL.description: Top-level container for all NIST SP 800-53 Rev5 control families

^CTL-[A-Z]{2}$.title: Control Family
^CTL-[A-Z]{2}$.description: A NIST SP 800-53 control family, keyed by CTL-{2-letter family code} (e.g. CTL-CA, CTL-AC)

^CTL-[A-Z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}[0-9]{2}(\\([0-9]{.title: Control
^CTL-[A-Z]{2}-[A-Z]{2}[0-9]{2}(\\([0-9]{.description: A FedRAMP Rev5 control entry, keyed by CTL-{family}-{control ID} (e.g. CTL-CA-CA07)

oneOf.title: Direct guidance
oneOf.$comment: Control applies the same guidance to all system classes. Requires all_classes and required_for.

oneOf.title: Class-specific guidance
oneOf.$comment: Control guidance differs by system class. Use varies_by_class instead of all_classes.

all_classes.description: FedRAMP guidance and parameters that apply uniformly across all system classes

varies_by_class.description: FedRAMP guidance and parameters broken out per system class (a, b, c, d)

required_for.description: Which system classes this control is required for

related_rules.description: NIST control IDs that are related to or referenced by this control

changelog.description: Summary of changes from the previous revision

FedrampGuidance.title: FedRAMP Guidance
FedrampGuidance.description: FedRAMP-specific guidance reference and parameter values for a control or system class

fedramp_guidance.description: FedRAMP guidance reference for this control

params.description: Parameter values that override or supplement the NIST control defaults

Param.title: Control Parameter
Param.description: A single parameter assignment for a control

id.description: Parameter identifier as defined in the NIST control

value.description: The assigned value for this parameter

ClassFlags.title: Class Flags
ClassFlags.description: Boolean flags indicating whether this control is required for each system class

VariesByClass.title: Class-Specific Guidance
VariesByClass.description: Per-class FedRAMP guidance, used when requirements differ across system classes
